summary: Backend API testing completed successfully. Frontend login page (ActivationGate) verified via screenshot. Main app features (QrCustomizer, Sidebar) are behind Firebase auth wall - cannot be tested without credentials.

issues: Arabic text appears to render with spacing issues in the heading font (visible in screenshot) - possibly a Tajawal font kerning issue with the animated/gradient effect, but may be intentional design

action_items: No Firebase test credentials available - QrCustomizer, Sidebar navigation, language toggle, and all authenticated features could NOT be tested. Main agent should provide test credentials or bypass auth for testing.
Consider adding a dev/test bypass for the ActivationGate to enable automated testing of authenticated features.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js line 203-206: navItems array only has 'qr' and 'cards', 'customize' is added separately below - this is fine but minor inconsistency.
server.py is clean and concise. GET/PUT /api/qr-style both working correctly with MongoDB persistence.
No input validation issues - Pydantic model handles defaults properly.
Firebase config is hardcoded in App.js (line 14-22) - should ideally be in env vars for security.

success_rate.backend: 100% (3/3 tests: GET default, PUT save, GET verify persistence)
success_rate.frontend: Partial - login page verified, authenticated pages not testable without credentials

test_credentials: No test credentials found in /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Firebase auth required for main app.
seed_data_creation: PUT /api/qr-style was called during testing - dotColor set to #ff0000, dotStyle to 'rounded', cornerStyle to 'dot'. May need to be reset.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend: GET /api/qr-style and PUT /api/qr-style both work correctly with MongoDB persistence. Frontend: Firebase auth (ActivationGate) is blocking all testing. Login page renders correctly in Arabic RTL. To test authenticated features (QrCustomizer, Sidebar with 3 items, language toggle), Firebase credentials are needed. The app URL is https://custom-qr-maker-4.preview.emergentagent.com
